title: Little Dimsum Baby Bandana Bibs Boys & Girls Super Absorbent 100% Organic Cotton Baby Bib Gift Set for Teething Drooling (Christmas 4-Piece Bib)
features: Wonderful Christmas prints – we have chosen the significant design of X-mas to offer the cutest bandana bib for toddlers. The set of 3 baby bibs with motifs such as pumpkin, black cats, spider web etc. is a perfect accessory for any baby outfit with the additional protection of clothes

Absorbent cotton drool bib – these stylish bibs are made from 100% absorbent cotton on the front and 68% cotton fleece on the back. The front of the bib is a stylish knitted fabric and the back is a super soft fleece that keeps your baby completely dry even with active babies. Ideal for teething babies

Adjustable bandana bi: 2 adjustable buttons provide a secure hold for babies between 0 and 36 months. You can still play on baby who plays freely. These are a good alternative to Velcro straps that are easy to tear off. Washing machine safe. Stays in shape after washing

Perfect baby shower gift – every friend expects a baby? Our product can be a nice choice for shower gift. With Halloween comes, if you have a baby, buy a Halloween gift! We offer you 3 patterns to choose from!
SATISFACTION GUARANTEED - If you have a quality or size problem, please feel free to contact us. We will try our best to meet your satisfaction!
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Christmas pattern 2 Absorbent cotton 3 Adjustable 4 Safety materials
